title: CRE Skills Customization Configuration
description: Schema for the 'customization' block in ~/.cre-skills/config.json. Controls local override behavior and feedback sharing.

feedback_enabled.description: Master switch for customization feedback. When false, no feedback payloads are created or sent.

feedback_mode.description: Controls how much data is included in feedback payloads. Each level includes all data from lower levels. 'metadata_and_content' requires explicit per-submission consent regardless of this setting.

feedback_endpoint.description: HTTPS endpoint for remote feedback submission. Empty string means local-only (no remote sends). Can be pointed at a custom enterprise endpoint.

require_consent.description: When true, always prompt the user before sending any feedback remotely. When false, send automatically per feedback_mode (still local-only if feedback_endpoint is empty).

dry_run.description: When true, build the payload and show a preview but never actually send. Useful for auditing what would be shared.
